(노트) ggplot2- Arranging plots

Jan 10, 2022 • 신록예찬 • 5 min read

R

  • imports
  • 기본사용법
  • 연산자
  • layout
  • Modifying subplots
  • super-title, sub-title, annotation
    • sub-title
  • plot 삽입

imports 

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

기본사용법

- p1~p4 정의

p1 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = displ, y = hwy))

p2 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_bar(aes(x = as.character(year), fill = drv), position = "dodge") + 
  labs(x = "year")

p3 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_density(aes(x = hwy, fill = drv), colour = NA) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(drv))

p4 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy, fill = drv), geom = "col", fun.data = mean_se) +
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy), geom = "errorbar", fun.data = mean_se, width = 0.5)

- p1과 p2를 합침

p1+p2

- p1~p4를 합침

p1+p2+p3+p4

연산자

- p1~p4 정의

p1 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = displ, y = hwy))

p2 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_bar(aes(x = as.character(year), fill = drv), position = "dodge") + 
  labs(x = "year")

p3 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_density(aes(x = hwy, fill = drv), colour = NA) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(drv))

p4 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy, fill = drv), geom = "col", fun.data = mean_se) +
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy), geom = "errorbar", fun.data = mean_se, width = 0.5)

- p1, p2 를 위아래로 합침

p1 / p2

- p1, p2를 좌우로 합침

p1 | p2

- 다양한 응용가능 1

(p1 | p2) / p3

- 다양한 응용가능 2

p1 | (p2 / p3)

- 다양한 응용가능 3

p3 | (p2 / (p1|p4))

layout

- p1~p4 정의

p1 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class))

p2 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_bar(aes(x = as.character(year), fill = drv), position = "dodge") + 
  labs(x = "year")

p3 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_density(aes(x = hwy, fill = drv), colour = NA) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(drv))

p4 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy, fill = drv), geom = "col", fun.data = mean_se) +
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy), geom = "errorbar", fun.data = mean_se, width = 0.5)

- p1,p2,p3 를 합치는데 layout을 조정

p1 + p2 + p3 + plot_layout(ncol = 2)

- 범례 가이드를 한쪽으로 정리하고 싶다면?

(step1) 원래그림

p1 + p2 + p3 + plot_layout(ncol = 2)

p1 + p2 + p3 + plot_layout(ncol = 2)

(step2) 가이드를 모음

p1 + p2 + p3 + plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides="collect")

(step3) 가이드에어리어를 따로 만들어줌

p1 + p2 + p3 + guide_area()+plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides="collect")

Modifying subplots

- p1~p4 정의

p1 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class))

p2 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_bar(aes(x = as.character(year), fill = drv), position = "dodge") + 
  labs(x = "year")

p3 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_density(aes(x = hwy, fill = drv), colour = NA) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(drv))

p4 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy, fill = drv), geom = "col", fun.data = mean_se) +
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy), geom = "errorbar", fun.data = mean_se, width = 0.5)

- 첫번째 그림 테마 변경

p <- (p1 + p2) / p3 
p[[1]][[1]] <- p[[1]][[1]] + theme_light()
p

- 두번째 그림 테마변경

p <- (p1 + p2) / p3 
p[[1]][[2]] <- p[[1]][[2]] + theme_light()
p

- 세번째 그림 테마변경

p <- (p1 + p2) / p3 
p[[2]] <- p[[2]] + theme_light()
p

- 모든서브플랏의 테마변경

p <- (p1 + p2) / p3 
p[[2]] <- p[[2]] + theme_light()
p & theme_minimal()

- 모든서브플랏의 y축범위변경

p = p1 / p4
p & scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 45))

super-title, sub-title, annotation

- p1~p4 정의

p1 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class))

p2 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_bar(aes(x = as.character(year), fill = drv), position = "dodge") + 
  labs(x = "year")

p3 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_density(aes(x = hwy, fill = drv), colour = NA) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(drv))

p4 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy, fill = drv), geom = "col", fun.data = mean_se) +
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy), geom = "errorbar", fun.data = mean_se, width = 0.5)

- supertitle, annotation

p <- p1 + p2 + p3 + p4 + plot_annotation(
  title = "A closer look at the effect of drive train in cars",
  caption = "Source: mpg dataset in ggplot2"
)
p

- 글씨체변경 (1)

p <- p1 + p2 + p3 + p4 + plot_annotation(
  title = "A closer look at the effect of drive train in cars",
  caption = "Source: mpg dataset in ggplot2",
  theme = theme_gray(base_family = "mono")  ### 이걸 추가하면 글씨체가 바뀐다.  
)
p

- 글씨체변경 (2)

p <- p1 + p2 + p3 + p4 + plot_annotation(
  title = "A closer look at the effect of drive train in cars",
  caption = "Source: mpg dataset in ggplot2"
)
p & theme_gray(base_family = "mono") 
## p + theme_gray(base_family = "mono") 는 동작하지 않음

sub-title

- p1~p4 정의

p1 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class))

p2 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_bar(aes(x = as.character(year), fill = drv), position = "dodge") + 
  labs(x = "year")

p3 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_density(aes(x = hwy, fill = drv), colour = NA) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(drv))

p4 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy, fill = drv), geom = "col", fun.data = mean_se) +
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy), geom = "errorbar", fun.data = mean_se, width = 0.5)

- 그림준비

p <- (p1 | (p2/p3)) + plot_annotation(
  title = "A closer look at the effect of drive train in cars",
  caption = "Source: mpg dataset in ggplot2"
)
p

- p[[1]], p[[2]] 확인

p[[1]]

p[[2]]

- tag_levels로 subtitle 만듬

p+plot_annotation(tag_levels = c("I"))

- tag_levels를 2단계로 함

p[[2]] <- p[[2]] + plot_layout(tag_level = "new")
p+plot_annotation(tag_levels = c("I","a"))
  • 별로 유용한지 모르겠음

plot 삽입

- p1~p4 정의

p1 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class))

p2 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_bar(aes(x = as.character(year), fill = drv), position = "dodge") + 
  labs(x = "year")

p3 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  geom_density(aes(x = hwy, fill = drv), colour = NA) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(drv))

p4 <- ggplot(mpg) + 
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy, fill = drv), geom = "col", fun.data = mean_se) +
  stat_summary(aes(x = drv, y = hwy), geom = "errorbar", fun.data = mean_se, width = 0.5)

- 그림삽입1

p1 + inset_element(p2, left = 0.5, bottom = 0.6, right = 0.9, top = 0.95)

- 그림삽입2

p24 <- p2 / p4 + plot_layout(guides = "collect")
p1 + inset_element(p24, left = 0.5, bottom = 0.5, right = 0.95, top = 0.9)

- 그림삽입3

p12 <- p1 + inset_element(p2, left = 0.4, bottom = 0.6, right = 0.9, top = 0.95) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A')
p12 & theme_bw()

Subscribe
